name: swarmtumx
description: tmux-first infinite canvas terminals for macOS

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/update-manager.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/runtime/paths.js && node --check src/runtime/state-store.js && node --check src/runtime/agent-db.js && node --check src/runtime/agent-service.js && node --check src/runtime/agent-broker.js && node --check src/runtime/tmux-adapter.js && node --check src/runtime/tmux-terminal-manager.js && node --check src/runtime/control-mode-terminal-manager.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js && node --check bin/swarmtumx-bridge.cjs && node --check bin/swarmtumx-agent.cjs && node --check scripts/electron-builder-before-pack.cjs && node --check scripts/build-mac-archives.cjs && node --check scripts/generate-app-icon.cjs
scripts.pack:mac: npm run icon:mac && npm run pack:deps && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir --mac --arm64
